generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for point cloud data acquisition"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HokuyoLiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel D435i Depth Camera for depth perception and stereo vision"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IntelD435iDepthDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle internal speed sensor for real-time velocity measurements"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle internal steering angle sensor for real-time steering measurements"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for motor voltage conversion and speed control"
]

instance SteeringServoController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo controller for steering angle adjustments"
]

instance Slash4x4AutonomousVehicle : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "1/10-scale autonomous vehicle based on Traxxas Slash 4x4 retrofitted with NVIDIA Jetson NX, Jetson Orin Nano, Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR, Intel D435i Depth Camera, and Vedder Electronic Speed Controller"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains Slash4x4AutonomousVehicle, HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelD435iDepthCamera, VehicleSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor, VedderElectronicSpeedController, SteeringServoController
]

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains DBSCANClusteringModel, KalmanFilterTrackingModel, ACCControlModel, MATLABSimulinkPointCloudProcessing, NVIDIAJetpack50SDK, Python38, CppNodeLifecycleManagement
]

instance UserEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains RemoteManagementService
]

instance CrossSystemEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains ROS2Middleware
]

instance HokuyoLiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance IntelD435iDepthDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoLiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkPointCloudProcessing
]

instance DepthPerceptionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth perception data from Intel D435i camera"
    DTDFVocab:fromData IntelD435iDepthDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkPointCloudProcessing
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time vehicle speed measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time steering angle measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance DBSCANClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering algorithm for LiDAR point cloud segmentation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkPointCloudProcessing
]

instance KalmanFilterTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for multi-object tracking in ADAS"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkPointCloudProcessing
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant Adaptive Cruise Control control model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCComputationOffloadingEnabler
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for hardware acceleration and system management"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ACCComputationOffloadingService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for inter-component communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for scripting and data processing workflows"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance CppNodeLifecycleManagement : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ implementation for ROS2 node lifecycle management"
    DTDFVocab:enables ROS2Middleware
]

instance MATLABSimulinkPointCloudProcessing : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for point cloud processing and complex system modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ACCComputationOffloadingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for ACC logic computation offloading to Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data monitoring including visualization and report generation"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight, ReportGenerationInsight
]

instance ACCComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computation offloading for ACC logic execution on Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCControlAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote management capabilities for ACC configuration and emergency controls"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCEnableAction, ACCDisableAction, SpeedAdjustmentAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of object tracks, vehicle state, and projected driving path"
]

instance ReportGenerationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Human-readable reports for operator monitoring and decision-making support"
]

instance ACCControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "ACC control commands for desired speed adjustment and emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ACCEnableAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable ACC functionality via remote UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ACCDisableAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disable ACC functionality via remote UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SpeedAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust desired speed for ACC via remote UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Trigger emergency braking via remote UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Transmission of ACC control signals (desired speed, emergency braking commands) from the Digital Twin Entity's Controlling FE to vehicle actuators, including motor voltage commands and steering servo adjustments."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time operation with ≤100 ms end-to-end latency (per 3GPP TS 22.185) and 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy across all components for event ordering and coordination."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Entity-based orchestration with Physical Twin Entity (vehicle-mounted Jetson Orin Nano), Digital Twin Entity (cloud-hosted), User Entity (separate client machines), and Cross-System Data Translation FE; intra-entity communication via ROS2, inter-entity via Wi-Fi."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design phase (ADAS development, validation of requirements) and operational phase (real-time monitoring, optimization, and health monitoring during vehicle operation)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 network for intra-entity communication, Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication, adhering to ≤100 ms latency and 100 ms clock synchronization requirements."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity on vehicle-mounted Jetson Orin Nano; Digital Twin Entity and Data Storage in cloud environment; User Entity components on separate client machines."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture for DT structure, ISO 15622 for ACC control functionality, and 3GPP TS 22.185 for V2V communication latency requirements."
]
